details.page_title: Duck.ai - DuckDuckGo가 선보이는 비공개 무료 AI 채팅

ui_layout.left_sidebar: Collapsed icon bar: new chat, voice chat, new image, settings, privacy protection
ui_layout.center_area: Chat area with 'All chats are private' heading, input field
ui_layout.input_field: Placeholder '비공개로 질문하기' (Ask privately), textarea with Enter to submit
ui_layout.toolbar: 응답 맞춤 설정, 사진/PDF 파일 추가, 추론 모드 (⚡ 빠른), model selector (GPT-5)
ui_layout.bottom_text: 모든 채팅은 비공개 상태로 유지됩니다. AI는 실수를 할 수 있습니다.
ui_layout.privacy_notice: DuckDuckGo가 익명 처리 완료. Zero data retention for this chat. AI 학습 없음.

chat_response.ai_response: I'm well—thanks. How can I help you today?
chat_response.user_message_style: Green/light green background bubble, full width
chat_response.ai_response_style: Left-aligned with gear/globe icon, plain text, action buttons (copy, download, retry, dislike)
chat_response.related_search: Shown below response — 'Paris capital of France facts' for France query

network_analysis.sse_event_format: JSON objects with 'id' field. Event types: rs_ (response start), fc_ (function call?), UUID (tool invocation?), msg_ (message content x2), then [DONE]

recommendation: DuckDuckGo uses standard SSE (text/event-stream) over HTTP/2 to duck.ai/duckchat/v1/chat. The SSE format uses JSON payloads with id-based event tracking. For warning template: need to match DuckDuckGo's specific SSE event structure (rs_, fc_, msg_ prefixed ids). CORS is permissive (Allow-Origin: *). Key insight: the Etap duckduckgo_sse template needs to emit events matching this format.
